3204850.name: Chef Brawl
3204850.description: Get ready for the ultimate kitchen showdown in this competitive online multiplayer cooking game, where up to 4 players can battle it out! The goal is simple: complete easy recipes before the timer runs out. But with constant chaos in the kitchen, it’s anything but easy. Sabotage your opponents by stunning or slowing them down while trying to keep your station under control. Timing and strategy are crucial as the kitchen becomes a battleground of culinary sabotage. When the cooking is done, a panel of three chefs will rate your dishes, but there’s more: sabotage your rivals effectively to boost your TV rating and earn extra points! Can you out-cook and out-sabotage your friends to become the ultimate Brawl Chef?
3204850.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
